body:
GOAL:
Run the full Digital Foreman execution cycle for this GitHub issue as a real system proof.

ISSUE:
DF SYSTEM PROOF - LEAD INTAKE TEST #30

REQUIREMENTS:
- convert the issue into a structured internal task
- classify and route it through the DF routing layer
- apply policy validation
- execute the task
- produce an artifact representing the initial lead intake record
- commit the result to the repository

RULES:
- deterministic execution only
- no manual shortcuts
- no test-only shortcuts
- use the current stable DF core baseline
- do not modify unrelated code
- if execution fails, report exact failing layer and stop

EXPECTED OUTPUT:
1. task id created
2. routing/type decision
3. policy validation result
4. artifact path
5. commit hash / commit message
6. concise execution summary
title: DF SYSTEM PROOF - LEAD INTAKE TEST #30
